_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Document analytical methodologies, data sources, business rules, and known data limitations for all recurring analyses and reports.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-007 (AB, cosine: 0.629), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.594).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.620). Shared vocabulary: [document]. DCWF-only terms [analytic, disseminate, findings] vs WIDAI-only terms [analyses, analytical, business, data, known, limitations] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.890, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.041 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Document and disseminate analytic findings." and "Document analytical methodologies, data sources, business rules, and known data" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.635 ≈ STS 0.620 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [document] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [document]. DCWF-only: [analytic, disseminate, findings]. WIDAI-only: [analyses, analytical, business, data, known, limitations].
